svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="C3WtaMoZt9T3dCsPIbxy" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="978" dy="749" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="consumer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Consumer
ObjectStorage {region}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="192" x="158" y="12" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="broker" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="resource-broker
routes by region" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="186" x="161" y="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="staging" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="staging workspaces<br>order copied in, provider realizes it,<br>status + secret projected back" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="465" x="21.5" y="172" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gcpkrop" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="gcp-prod
krop blueprint" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="408" y="313" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="azkrop" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="azure-prod
krop blueprint" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="86.5" y="313" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="providergcp" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="provider-gcp
CloudAPI Bucket → GCPBucket" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="254" x="371" y="393" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xplane" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Crossplane
Composition + XRD" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="210" x="393" y="473" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tf" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="provider-terraform
google_storage_bucket" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="236" x="380" y="553" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aso" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Azure Service Operator
RG → Account → Container (ARM)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="329" x="12" y="393" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gcp" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="GCP
Cloud Storage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="418" y="633" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="azure" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Azure
Blob Storage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="96.5" y="473" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="consumer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;curved=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="broker"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="254" y="77" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="broker" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;curved=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;curved=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="azure"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="176.5" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#999999;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;align=left;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;" value="Legend" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="199" width="240" x="660" y="12" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="standard API (consumer)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="210" x="675" y="42" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="broker (routing + staging)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="210" x="675" y="74" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="krop provider blueprint" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="210" x="675" y="106" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="preexisting operators for clouds (Crossplane+Terraform, ASO)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="210" x="675" y="138" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="real cloud (GCP / Azure)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="210" x="675" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
